title: Ceramic Wax Melt Burner & Wax Melts - Essential Oil Burners for Wax Melts Aroma Diffuser Butterfly Cutouts Furnace - Assorted Wax Warmer Aromatherapy Decor Gift Set for Home and Office
features: ELEGANT CUT-OUT DESIGN: Transform your space with this elegant ceramic wax melt burner, beautifully crafted with delicate butterfly cut-outs. When lit, the candle burner casts a soft, glowing effect, making it both stylish and functional, a perfect candle burner to brighten any room.

ASSORTED WAX MELTS: Enjoy variety with 4 colourful wax melt bars, each crafted to suit different moods from refreshing to relaxing. Each bar offers a unique aroma to refresh, relax, or uplift your space. Conveniently segmented, the wax melts burner provides multiple long-lasting uses.

RELAXING AROMATHERAPY ATMOSPHERE: Turn any room into a peaceful retreat with this wax warmer for wax melts, perfect for your living room, bedroom, or bathroom. The gentle glow and aromas from the wax melt warmer help you relax, meditate, or unwind after a busy day.

EASY & SAFE TO USE: Place a wax segment on the top of the candle warmer and a tealight below to enjoy hours of aroma. Made from durable ceramic, this wax warmer ensures even melting and safe long-term use. It’s a simple way to enjoy your favourite ambience.

PERFECT GIFT SET: Delight your loved ones with this complete candle wax burner and wax melts set, thoughtfully designed for both style and function. Whether as a housewarming present, birthday or a thank-you, this elegant design adds beauty and charm. A practical choice for any home.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always use this product with adult supervision. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Never leave the lit tealight unattended. Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Do not ingest the wax melts. Keep the product clean and free of debris to prevent fire hazards.
